title: QA_ORBIT_PISANO_5_FACTOR_BOUNDARY_CERT.v1
description: Fixture schema for QA Orbit Pisano 5-Factor Boundary Cert [277]. Primary source for the Pisano-period framing: arxiv:1609.02907 placeholder (replaced by Wall 1960 DOI 10.1080/00029890.1960.11989541 in the mapping_protocol_ref). The fixture declares modulus, shortcut undercount expectation, overclaim expectation, and (for PASS fixtures) the gcd-signature decomposition of the missed pairs.
